title: AISC 360-16 Steel Channel Design
description: Design steel channels in accordance with AISC 360-16.

s3d_section.description: Section ID. Symbol: Section. Section object imported from S3D model.

section.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Select Custom to edit section dimensions.

d.description: Depth (d). Units: in. Total section depth.

bf.description: Width (bf). Symbol: b_{f}. Units: in. Total section width.

tf.description: Flange Thickness (tf). Symbol: t_{f}. Units: in. Flange thickness for the section.

tw.description: Web Thickness (tw). Symbol: t_{w}. Units: in. Web thickness for the section.

Fy.description: Yield Stress (Fy). Symbol: F_{y}. Units: ksi. Steel yield stress.

Fu.description: Ultimate Stress (Fu). Symbol: F_{u}. Units: ksi. Steel ultimate stress.

Lz.description: Span (Lz). Symbol: L_{z}. Units: ft. Strong geometric axis unbraced length.

Ly.description: Span (Ly). Symbol: L_{y}. Units: ft. Weak geometric axis unbraced length.

Kz.description: Effective Length Factor (kz). Symbol: k_{z}. Strong geometric axis effective length factor.

Ky.description: Effective Length Factor (ky). Symbol: k_{y}. Weak geometric axis effective length factor.

Cbz.description: Torsional Buckling Factor (Cbz). Symbol: Cb_{z}. Lateral torsional buckling modification factor for non-uniform moment diagrams about Z (major) axis.

Cby.description: Torsional Buckling Factor (Cby). Symbol: Cb_{y}. Lateral torsional buckling modification factor for non-uniform moment diagrams about Y (minor) axis.

U.description: Shear Lag Factor (U). Shear lag factor.

Nc.description: Axial Compression (Nc). Symbol: N_{c}. Units: kip

Nt.description: Axial Tension (Nt). Symbol: N_{t}. Units: kip

Vz.description: Shear (Vz). Symbol: V_{z}. Units: kip. Shear force about minor axis.

Vy.description: Shear (Vy). Symbol: V_{y}. Units: kip. Shear force about major axis.

Mz.description: Major Bending Moment (Mz). Symbol: M_{z}. Units: kip-ft. Moment about major axis.

My.description: Minor Bending Moment (My). Symbol: M_{y}. Units: kip-ft. Moment about minor axis.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
